# Yohaku Companion v1.7.7

## Highlights

- Added direct Live Desk song links for supported QQ Music and NetEase Cloud Music playback, allowing the current media card to open the matching provider page.
- Resolved provider song identifiers from each player's local playback queue, without relying on a remote song-search API.

## Fixes and reliability

- Matched local queue entries against sanitized title, artist, album, and duration metadata, and omitted the link when candidates are ambiguous or invalid.
- Restricted published links to canonical HTTPS song pages on the two supported provider domains and kept legacy Core deployments compatible.
- Added a distinct icon to the menu-bar sharing action.

## Update notes

- Playback links activate when Yohaku Core advertises the `mediaPlaybackLinks` capability introduced in Core v13.14.1; older Core versions continue to receive Presence without the link.
- No additional environment variable or player account credential is required.
